name: Magic Missile
description: Bolts of force strike targets; the result die scales the number and damage.

name: Magic Shield
description: An invisible shield of force improves your defenses.

name: Cantrip
description: Minor magical tricks and effects of the caster's choosing.

name: Choking Cloud
description: A cloud of noxious vapor sickens and damages those within.

name: Ropework
description: You command a rope to move, bind, or animate.

name: Spider Climb
description: You climb walls and ceilings as a spider does.

name: Sleep
description: Creatures in an area fall into magical slumber.

name: Invoke Patron
description: You call on your otherworldly patron for aid; results vary wildly.

name: Detect Magic
description: You sense magical auras and their relative power.

name: Animal Summoning
description: You call beasts to your aid; greater results summon stronger creatures.

name: Levitate
description: You rise and float, controlling your vertical movement.

name: Scorching Ray
description: Searing rays of flame lance out at your foes.

name: Fireball
description: A roaring burst of flame engulfs an area (save for half).

name: Lightning Bolt
description: A stroke of lightning blasts everything in a line.

name: Runic Alphabet
description: You inscribe potent magical runes with delayed or triggered effects.

name: Polymorph
description: You reshape a creature into another form.

name: Control Fire
description: You shape, douse, or kindle flames within range.

name: Lay on Hands
description: You heal wounds by touch; aligned targets benefit most.

name: Word of Command
description: A divine command compels a creature to obey a single word.

name: Holy Sanctuary
description: A blessed ward protects an area or creature from harm.

name: Cure Paralysis
description: You free a creature from paralysis and similar bonds.

name: Banish
description: You drive an extraplanar creature back to its home plane.

name: Divine Symbol
description: You manifest your deity's symbol to smite foes or shield allies.
